# Interior / Layout — Juplaya Trailer Build

Split from `../juplaya-trailer-context.md` (doc divorce, design-panel run).

## Use case & on-hand
- Hauls two bikes — **WR250R + CRF450RL, ~590 lb** combined — convertible "bikes-out → sleeping deck."
- **~(6) 10 ft black powder-coated E-track sections** — believed ordered (confirm). **Footage likely short: ~73 ft needed vs ~60 on hand; order more.**

## Floor E-track / bike layout
- Bikes **side-by-side, both nose-forward** (roadside), flush-recessed E-track bolted through to steel; reuse the 4 factory 5,000 lb D-rings. **Staggered chocks 12–18"** to interleave the 32–34" bars.
- **⚠ NEEDS REWORK (agy, run 1):** the planned ~24" centerline spacing causes ~9" **handlebar interference** (need ~33" clear), and the **2"×4" main rails run at the perimeter, not ±12" off centerline** — centerline rows miss the steel, and a 1/2" recess leaves only ~1/4" ply between crossmembers. **Re-derive spacing/position against the actual steel locations + measured bar width.**
- **Aisle reality (panel review):** with the fridge bay (20.9" deep) curbside, the *nominal* center aisle is ~30", but aisle-side handlebars overhang ~8–10" at bar height — **effective walking aisle ~20"**. Plan fridge access and egress around that, or revisit the stagger.

## Fridge bay (Dometic CFX3 95DZ — see [systems](systems.md), D008)
- Floor, **curbside, immediately aft of the personnel door**, strapped to floor E-track. 37.9"×20.9"×18.6" + **lid-swing clearance** (verify the split-lid hinge orientation before fixing the bay against the wall). **Thermal gate:** ventilated/shaded bay, away from the AIO nose-cabinet heat plume (110 °F ambient ceiling; dual-zone setpoint cap >86 °F).

## Wall E-track heights
- **Bed row ~34", shelf row ~60"**, both backed onto the 16"-OC vertical posts (tube posts per the work order).

## Bed shoring
- **E-track sockets that accept 2×4 lumber** (not fixed aluminum) — reconfigurable, cheap/replaceable.

## Walls
- Keep the factory liner; **FRP textured panel over it, no paint**; 1/4" XPS thermal break **only behind the bed zone**; FRP trim; backing in before finish.

## Door stairs
- **Folding/telescoping aluminum RV step that stows on the E-track grid** (not welded, not door-hung).

## Panel transport slot
- The ground-pair LG455s (83" long vs the 81" interior width) ride **lengthwise** — give them a padded E-track wall slot.

## Measurement gates (interior)
- Front-tire centerlines; actual floor-steel locations; bar width; fridge lid-hinge orientation; E-track footage recount.
